name: The Wildwood Circle
motto: The forest remembers what the cities forget.
goal: Protect the great forests from corruption, both magical and political — and contain Thorne Blackroot before his curse becomes the realm's funeral.
fears: the curse spreading from Thorne to the elder groves
kings burning the forests for farmland
their own grief turning them into him

faction_state.tensions: Half the Circle wants to bring Thorne home. The other half wants to put him in the ground. Both halves know the curse came from inside their own ranks.

name: House Voss
motto: Blood is the only currency that does not depreciate.
goal: Consolidate political power across the noble houses by being the indispensable broker of secrets. Long-term: rule the realm without ever wearing a crown.
fears: the bloodline ending with Seraphine
a peasant uprising she cannot manipulate
being known for what she actually is

faction_state.tensions: Public face of charm and culture. Private face of sustenance.

name: The Obsidian Crown
motto: We were dragons before we were kings.
goal: Maintain the dragon-blooded royal line as the realm's apex authority. Recover the lost sister-line that broke off three centuries ago. Keep the Voss in their place beneath the throne.
fears: the bloodline thinning further
the lost sister-line returning with claim
House Voss outliving them

faction_state.tensions: Queen Morwen's heir was born without scales. The court is in cipher-coded panic.

name: The Goblin Warband League
motto: We were here before the Crown. We will be here after.
goal: Maintain the seven goblin warbands as a loose military league. Raid noble caravans for tribute. Avoid losing all-out war with the Crown that the warbands cannot win.
fears: the Crown deciding to actually finish them
internal warband betrayal
a goblin chieftain marrying into Voss

faction_state.tensions: Two warbands are openly disputing leadership of the league. Grokka has not taken sides.

name: The Paladin Order of the Lit Veil
motto: Where the dead walk, we follow with light.
goal: Hunt the undead. Investigate House Voss formally. Maintain the Order's centuries-old mandate to protect the living from the unliving.
fears: House Voss formally exposing them as wrong about her
the goblin warbands crowning a vampire
the Pantheon Priesthood withdrawing divine sanction

faction_state.tensions: Commander Aria has been quietly building a case against Lady Voss for thirty years. She has not yet decided when to execute. She has begun to suspect she will not get the chance.

name: The Arcane University at Spiremount
motto: Magic is older than its rules. The rules are still being written.
goal: Train wizards in all schools (evocation / abjuration / divination / illusion / enchantment / conjuration / necromancy / transmutation). Catalog the metaphysical substrate. Resist the political demand to weaponize the curriculum.
fears: the Crown commandeering the necromancy department
the Voss enrolling a daughter as a sleeper
Thorne Blackroot's curse being the substrate's response to overuse

faction_state.tensions: The necromancy department is producing graduates twice as fast as the other schools. The faculty council suspects external recruiting pressure.

name: The Underwarrens Thieves' Guild
motto: Take what is unguarded. Refuse what is asked.
goal: Maintain the under-city as a sovereign criminal economy. Negotiate the standing arrangement with House Voss and the Crown. Protect the Underwarrens from being formally claimed by either.
fears: the paladins finally raiding the warrens
House Voss escalating from arrangement to ownership
a member turning informant

faction_state.tensions: Guildmaster Renn is debating whether to formally accept House Voss's offer to make the Guild her enforcement arm. Most Guild members would rather not.

name: The Pantheon Priesthood of the Twelve
goal: Maintain the worship of the Twelve Gods across the realm. Mediate between the divine and the kingdoms. Officially endorse the Paladin Order's mandate. Privately worry about the Wildwood Circle's account of Thorne's curse.
fears: one god gaining favor at the cost of others
the substrate becoming too unstable to channel
House Voss's bloodline turning out to be one of the Twelve in disguise

faction_state.tensions: High Priestess Kaelan has had three visions in the past year suggesting one of the Twelve is no longer answering her prayers. She has not told the order.
